<!-- Thanks for contributing to scrape-do-python! Please fill in the sections below. -->

## Description

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link to the issue it closes if any. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore (CI, build, tooling)

## Checklist

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated for the new behavior
- [ ] Public API additions/changes have Google-style docstrings
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` section updated under the appropriate `### Added` / `### Changed` / `### Fixed` / `### Removed` heading
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes locally
- [ ] `mypy src/` passes locally

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #12, Refs #34 -->
